channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Despises RINOs. So Why Is He Reportedly About To Endorse One Of The Swamp’s Biggest?
item.description: Endorsing John Cornyn, the Senate’s leading RINO, would be disloyal to Texas’ loyal conservative base — and to himself.

item.title: Two dozen blue states sue over Trump's new tariffs
item.description: Blue states sued President Trump on Thursday over his latest attempt to impose global tariffs, saying the new batch of levies misapplies a law designe...

item.title: 17 Times James Talarico Made Us Wonder If He Was Created In A Lab
item.description: From arguing 'God is nonbinary' to 'grieving' over protecting the unborn, it's clear Talarico is a leftist lab experiment gone wrong.

item.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin? Trump's pick to lead DHS after firing Kristi Noem
item.description: President Trump announced Thursday that he is firing Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and nominating Sen. Markwayne Mullin, Oklahoma Republican...

item.title: 10 Times John Cornyn Betrayed Trump And MAGA
item.description: Cornyn's record indicates that he has often sided with the interests of the GOP establishment over those of Trump and his voters.

item.title: Silicon Valley legend Vinod Khosla has ‘no plans to leave California’ amid billionaire tax uproar—but he has another idea to fix the wealth loophole
item.description: Imagine a world where taxes just "go away" for everyone making less than $100,000 a year, Khosla told Fortune.

item.title: Colin Gray’s Conviction Is Just, but It’s Not a Game Changer
item.description: Gray’s murder conviction for supplying the gun his son used to commit a mass shooting is not the remarkable moment many want it to be.

item.title: Virginia Dems mandate Jan. 6 be taught as ‘violent insurrection,’ ban election fraud claims in schools
item.description: Virginia Democrats passed a controversial bill requiring schools teach students that Jan. 6 was a violent insurrection and banning election fraud clai...

item.title: Progressive firebrand concedes in cliffhanger North Carolina congressional primary battle with incumbent Dem
item.description: Progressive challenger Nida Allam conceded the narrow North Carolina congressional Democratic primary to Rep. Valerie Foushee by 1%.

item.title: Paxton offers to drop out of Texas Senate runoff if Congress passes stalled SAVE America Act
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said Thursday he'll drop out of the Republican Senate runoff against incumbent John Cornyn if the upper chamber can ...

item.title: Iran War Proves Trump Was Right on Space Force
item.description: Making the Space Force the newest branch of the U.S. military is yielding clear benefits in Iran.

item.title: Hegseth Partners With 17 Countries To Fight Narcoterrorists In Western Hemisphere
item.description: The Americas Counter Cartel Conference Joint Security Declaration aims to 'expand multilateral and bilateral cooperation' in the hemisphere to combat ...

item.title: Nearly all suspects arrested in St Paul church storming; MLK’s niece says hostile tactics ‘not the way’
item.description: Dr. Alveda King condemned protesters who stormed a Minnesota church, saying hostility and disruption betray the nonviolent legacy of MLK’s Civil Right...

item.title: Mission Accomplished. For Now
item.description: The WFB legacy stands. Long live the legacy.

item.title: Trump boots Kristi Noem, picks Markwayne Mullin as new DHS secretary
item.description: President Trump said Thursday he is installing Sen. Markwayne Mullin as the new head of Homeland Security and sidelining Secretary Kristi Noem, markin...

item.title: Korean startup Wrtn is on track to pass $100M in annual recurring revenue, riding a loneliness-epidemic-fueled boom in AI entertainment
item.description: Chief product officer Dong-jae Lee uses the analogy of a dungeon master for a tabletop RPG: The AI constructs a narrative in response to user choices.

item.title: Make Antitrust Boring Again
item.description: Washington is trying to relitigate the tech economy in real time.

item.title: Pentagon policy chief grilled as Dem claims Trump broke promise about going to war with Iran
item.description: Pentagon policy chief Elbidge Colby was grilled on President Donald Trump's past statements on war with Iran as Operation Epic Fury continues.

item.title: Cornyn goes on offense against Paxton as Republicans await Trump's endorsement
item.description: As Texas waits on President Donald Trump's promised endorsement, Sen. John Cornyn isn't holding back on his runoff opponent in the Republican primary.

item.title: SpaceX is poised to raise more money in its IPO than was raised in last year’s 90 IPOs combined
item.description: And that means Wall Street will make more money, too.

item.title: Endorsing Cornyn Jeopardizes Trump’s Legacy On Immigration
item.description: At the 2024 Republican National Convention, attendees held signs reading 'Mass Deportations.' Trump campaigned and won on that promise, which is why t...

item.title: America and Israel Remind the World How Wars Are Fought to Victory
item.description: For some, it is a disorienting experience.

item.title: Tafoya rips Walz 'dodging' accountability in hearing, unveils plan to fight fraud: 'Full weight of the law'
item.description: Republican Senate candidate Michele Tafoya slammed Tim Walz over his testimony on Minnesota's fraud scandal, calling his responses completely inadequa...

item.title: The Question That Exposes Weak Quant Models
item.description: Errant variables can quietly undermine even the most statistically impressive quant models. The post The Question That Exposes Weak Quant Models appea...

item.title: NLP and Yield Curve Prediction From Central Bank Minutes
item.description: Can algorithms that analyze central bank language help predict the next move in the yield curve? The post NLP and Yield Curve Prediction From Central ...

item.title: International Women’s Day: Women Leaders Put Nutrition First
item.description: Women are three times more likely than men to invest in eating well. The post International Women’s Day: Women Leaders Put Nutrition First appeared fi...

item.title: Three Levers That Drive VC Returns
item.description: VC performance hinges on ownership and failure reduction, not just rare breakout wins. The post Three Levers That Drive VC Returns appeared first on C...

item.title: Geopolitical Risk and Portfolio Oversight
item.description: A framework for identifying material geopolitical shocks, translating them into portfolio impacts, and documenting risk for oversight and governance. ...

item.title: The Fidelity CEO’s surprise record as a crypto visionary
item.description: Fidelity’s Abigail Johnson has had the vision and courage to pursue a strategy even when her Big Finance peers shied away.

item.title: Polychain raises $200 million for fourth crypto VC fund, shakes up staff
item.description: The firm founded by Coinbase alum Olaf Carlson-Wee is shifting its focus.
